race.comment: PISTON REBEL (1) loves it here around this circuit with two wins and two placings from just four spins and will be high on confidence following that last-start victory. Winning hoop Lerena stays on board and can go back-to-back without surprising. Former Victorian STRANGLEHOLD (4) has looked good in both runs since joining the new stable and will strip fitter third-up from the break. Best form puts him right in this. NOIRE EMPEROR (3) is one from one over this course and distance and rarely puts in a poor one. Definite top-three contender. MR BUBBALUSKI (2) is on the doorstep of another win and must be respected out of the Bruce camp. In the mix. MADAME CODY (11) next best.
